case_title: GUREGHIAN, ARA et al VS SAN FRANCISCO NEWSPAPER AGENCY RISK MANAGMENT DEPT

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO NEWSPAPER AGENCY RISK MANAGMENT DEPT

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $600.00 FILED BY GUREGHIAN, ARA RECIO, CYNTHIA AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO NEWSPAPER AGENCY RISK MANAGMENT DEPT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-22-1997 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT C

STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
